role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of linguistic markers (signs, scripts) and stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, geology, and climate cues appropriate for the role.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed vegetation density and soil type, staying within botanical scope.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road infrastructure and markings, correctly noting their absence.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized the unique architectural style of the walls to distinguish the region.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described the limestone soil and dry-stone walls.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Accurately described the sparse scrub and arid soil.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described the narrow road and lack of markings.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Accurately described the wall construction style.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The agents unanimously identified Malta based on the distinctive dry-stone walls and limestone terrain. The judge correctly followed Path A (consensus) and validated the country hypothesis.
verdict.region_narrowing_notes: All four active agents reached a consensus on Malta immediately. The judge correctly identified this consensus and skipped the region hypothesis phase.
verdict.hypothesis_pool_notes: The pool included Malta (the truth) and plausible Mediterranean lookalikes (Tunisia, Cyprus). The pool was highly relevant to the visual evidence.
